title: More Recipes: Undo Mini-Collection
description: A mini-collection of recipes that add ways to un-craft various items.
body:
Recipe downloads have been split into their own projects for better Modrinth App compatibility.\
Links to all recipes in description

This project includes uncrafting Amethyst Block, Bricks, Dripstone Block, Glowstone, Honeycomb Block, Magma Block, Nether Bricks, Resin Bricks, Snow Block, Blue Ice, Packed Ice, Glass Pane, Stained Glass Pane, Copper & Iron Bars, Sandstone, Red Sandstone, all Slabs, & Wool.


#### Installation:
- Put the datapack in your "/AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/saves/[Your World Here]/datapack" folder.
- ***DO NOT put the datapack in your "/AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks" folder.***
- If you changed where Minecraft loads from, find that location and use that "saves" folder.
- For servers, put it in your world folder that matches where your server.properties file says.

#### For advanced users:
- IF you want to store it in your ".minecraft" folder, CREATE a folder called "datapack" and put it there.
- From there, when you create a world and go to add datapacks, you can simply go to this folder and grab what you need.
- For identical recipes in multiple data packs, load desired recipes AFTER their duplicates

Datapack version is formatted as A.B.C
- A marks breaking changes to how the data pack is written
- B marks changes in either the "Pack Format" version or the game version itself (major update)
  - Special Note: as of 5.5.0 (1.21.9), pack formating now has minor versions. All minor versions for any given major versions are intended to fully compatible (i.e. - 88.0, 88.1, etc.) and listed as only the major version (i.e. - 88).
- C marks minor changes or fixes

The different release versions of "More Recipes by Selah":
- More Recipes: A balance of Quality of Life recipes while still feeling Vanilla
- Mini-Collections: Every recipe in "More Recipes" sub-divided into seven (7) categories
  - Additional, Change, Color, New, Smelting, Stonecutting, Undo
- Alpha: Every recipe divided into sub-categories based on the Mini-Collection categories
  - This is effectively the test version of all recipes
  - This is where recipes not in the Mini-Collection or comprehensive releases are
  - Feedback encouraged to bring as many recipes into the comprehensive release as possible

Datapacks were not a thing before 1.13. There is no way to make these compatible older than 1.13.

There are special cases where breaking changes that are not backwards compatible don't have the "A" value incremented:
- Item names are changed
  - ex: 1.1.x changes "rose_red" to "red_dye"
- A non-breaking functionality is added
  - ex: 2.6.x in 1.19.3 adds categories while anything before ignores them
- A change is made that doesn't stop the previous method from working
  - ex: "crafting_shapeless" works in all versions, "minecraft:crafting_shapeless" starting in 1.1.x
- Changes to the way "pack.mcmeta" is read
  - ex: see changes in 25w31a

Major breaking changes to each version:
 - 2.0.0 MC 1.17: Advancement Format change - custom recipe "condition" ("items")
 - 3.0.0 MC 1.20.5: Recipe Format change - recipe "result"
 - 4.0.0 MC 1.21: Folder Name change
 - 5.0.0 MC 1.21.2: Recipe Format change - shaped "key" and shapeless "ingredients"


This pack was made by Selah (AspieGamer13).\
If you want to use this pack in your single player worlds or multiplayer servers, just use them.\
This is what they're meant for.\
If you want to use this pack in your custom modpack or similar, there is ONE condition:
Make sure you give proper credit for these packs.\
There is NO authroization to modify elements of this pack with intent to redistribute.\
You may ONLY modify elements of this pack FOR PERSONAL USE.


The following are valid Download Links for any pack in the "More Recipes by Selah" series\
as of the upload of this version on Modrinth. Additional packs are constantly in development\
and may be released after this and missing from this list.

<details><summary>All Recipes in "More Recipes by Selah" series</summary>

### Recipe List:

(Based on latest releases, download links above)

Additional
 - Bone Block
   - Craft Bone Block from Bone
 - Chest
   - Craft Chest from Log or Wood
 - Copper Torch
   - Craft Copper Torch from Torch
 - Dispenser
   - Craft Dispenser from Dropper & Bow
   - Craft Dispenser from Dropper & Bow recipe
 - Red Nether Bricks
   - Craft Red Nether Bricks from Nether Bricks
 - Soul Torch
   - Craft Soul Torch from Torch
 - Trapped Chest Craft
   - Craft Trapped Chest from Chest & Tripwire Hook

Change
 - Armor Trim Template*
   - Added to single Armor Trim group
   - Group excludes Netherite Upgrade Armor Trim
   - Reduce Diamond cost to clone to 3
 - Banner*
   - Reduce Wool cost to craft to 2
 - Copper Trapdoor
   - Reduce Copper Ingot cost to craft to 4
 - Golden Apple
   - Restore Minecraft 1.1 - 1.6 Golden Apple recipe using Gold Nugget
 - Lead
   - Craft Lead using only String
 - Lodestone
   - Craft Lodestone using Iron Ingot
 - Saddle*
   - Original Saddle recipe before added to vanilla Minecraft
   - Craft Saddle from Leather & Iron Ingot
 - Trapped Chest Used
   - Craft Chest Boat from Trapped Chest
   - Craft Chest Minecart from Trapped Chest
   - Craft Hopper from Trapped Chest
   - Craft Shulker Box from Trapped Chest
 - Wood
   - Increase recipe output to 4

Color
 - Bed
   - Dye Bed any color (1 to 1)
 - Candle
   - Dye Candle any color (1 to 1)
 - Carpet & Wool
   - Dye Carpet & Wool any color (8 to 8)
   - Can use output color as input
   - Keeps vanilla 1 to 1 recipe
 - Concrete & Powder
   - Dye Concrete & Concrete Powder any color (8 to 8)
   - Can use output color as input
 - Stained Glass & Pane
   - Dye Stained Glass & Stained Glass Pane any color (8 to 8)
   - Can use output color as input
 - Terracotta & Glazed
   - Dye Terracotta and Glazed Terracotta any color (8 to 8)
   - Can use output color as input

New
 - Calcite
   - Craft Calcite from Diorite & Bone Block
 - Chainmail
   - Craft all Chainmail Armor from Iron Bars
 - Cobweb
   - Craft Cobweb from String
 - Coral
   - Craft Coral Block from Coral or Coral Fan (matching coral type)
 - Elytra
   - Craft Elytra from Phantom Membrane
 - Enchanted Golden Apple
   - Restore Minecraft 1.3.1 - 1.8.9 Enchanted Golden Apple recipe using Gold Block
 - Fungus*
   - Craft Crimson Fungus from Crimson Roots & Red Mushroom
   - Craft Warped Fungus from Warped Roots & Brown Mushroom
 - Gilded Blackstone*
   - Craft Gilded Blackstone from Blackstone and Gold Nugget
   - Recipe uses average drop of Gold Nugget from Fortune III
 - Horse Armor
   - Craft Diamond Horse Armor from Diamond
   - Craft Gold Horse Armor from Gold Ingot
   - Craft Iron Horse Armor from Iron Ingot
   - Craft Copper Horse Armor from Copper Ingot
 - Mushroom Block*
   - Craft Red Mushroom Block from Red Mushroom
   - Craft Brown Mushroom Block from Brown Mushroom
   - Craft Mushroom Stem from Red Mushroom and Brown Mushroom
 - Music*
   - Clone music discs with Disc Fragment 5
   - Excludes Music Disc 5
 - Nametag
   - Craft Nametag from Paper & String
 - Pottery Sherd*
   - Clone pottery sherds with Brick
 - Red Sand
   - Craft Red Sand from Iron Nugget & Sand
 - Rooted Dirt
   - Craft Rooted Dirt from Dirt & Hanging Roots
 - Saddle
   - Craft Saddle from Leather & Iron Ingot
 - Soul Soil
   - Craft Soul Soil from Dirt & Soul Sand
 - Spore Blossom
   - Craft Spore Blossom from Big Dripleaf & Allium
 - String
   - Craft String from Cobweb (equivalent to using a Sword)

Smelting
 - Petrified Oak Slab
   - Smelt Oak Slab into Petrified Oak Slab (Furnace only)
 - Redstone Ore Fix
   - Fix Redstone Ore Category
 - Sand & Glass Blasting
   - Smelt Gravel into Sand (Blast Furnace only)
   - Smelt Sand into Glass (Blast Furnace added)
 - Ore Block
   - Smelt Copper Ore Block into Copper Block (smelt time scaled)
   - Smelt Gold Ore Block into Gold Block (smelt time scaled)
   - Smelt Iron Ore Block into Iron Block (smelt time scaled)

Stonecutting
 - Cobble
   - Stonecut Stone to Cobblestone
   - Stonecut Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate
 - Plank Slab
   - Stonecut Plank to Slab (matching wood type)
 - Plank Stairs
   - Stonecut Plank to Stairs (matching wood type)

Undo
 - Blocks
   - Uncraft Amethyst Block
   - Uncraft Bricks
   - Uncraft Dripstone Block
   - Uncraft Glowstone
   - Uncraft Honeycomb Block
   - Uncraft Magma Block
   - Uncraft Nether Bricks
   - Uncraft Resin Bricks
   - Uncraft Snow Block
 - Ice
   - Uncraft Packed Ice
   - Uncraft Blue Ice
 - Nether Wart Block*
   - Uncraft Nether Wart Block
 - Pane
   - Uncraft Glass Pane
   - Uncraft Stained Glass Pane
   - Uncraft Iron Bars
   - Uncraft Copper Bars (all Oxidation and Wax states)
 - Polished Stone*
   - Uncraft Polished Andesite
   - Uncraft Polished Diorite
   - Uncraft Polished Granite
 - Quartz Block*
   - Uncraft Quartz Block
 - Sandstone
   - Uncraft Sandstone
   - Uncraft Red Sandstone
 - Slab
   - Uncraft Slab (matching material)
 - Trapped Chest*
   - Uncraft Trapped Chest (loses Tripwire Hook)
 - Wool
   - Uncraft Wool

*These recipes are only available in their individual projects.
</details>


**Bug Reports and Idea Submissions on my Discord and Project GitHub page**\
